zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Martha Micklewood於1531年出生在英國諾福爾可班納姆時，她的父親Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke26歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne30歲。她於大約1550年與Rowland Clarke在英國諾福爾可班納姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年1月在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可班納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Martha Micklewood于1531年出生在英国諾福爾可班納姆时，她的父亲Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke26岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne30岁。她于大约1550年与Rowland Clarke在英国諾福爾可班納姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年1月在她的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可班納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Martha Micklewood was born in 1531, in Banham, Norfolk, England, her father, Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke, was 26 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne, was 30. She married Rowland Clarke about 1550, in Banham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in January 1593, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Banham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Martha Micklewood est née en 1531, à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Rowland Clarke environ 1550, à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1593, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Banham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Martha Micklewood 1531 in Banham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne 30. Sie hat um 1550 in Banham, Norfolk, England Rowland Clarke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb im Januar 1593 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Banham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Martha Micklewood è nata il nel 1531 nel Banham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Rowland Clarke circa 1550, nel Banham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1593, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Banham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Martha Micklewoodが1531年にイギリスノーフォルクバンハムで生まれた時，父Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrookeは26歳，母Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogneは30歳であった。約1550年にイギリスノーフォルクバンハムでRowland Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1593年1月に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクバンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Martha Micklewood(이)가 1531년 영국 노르폴크 반함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 영국 노르폴크 반함에서 Rowland Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 1월 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 반함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Martha Micklewood nasceu em 1531, em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Rowland Clarke aproximadamente 1550, em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1593, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Martha Micklewood родилась в 1531 г. в местности банам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rowland Clarke около 1550 г. в местности банам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла январь 1593 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности банам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Martha Micklewood nació en 1531, en Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Micklewood de Clare Earl of Pembrooke, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Anne Bishop de Bourgogne, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Rowland Clarke aproximadamente 1550, en Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en enero de 1593, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Banham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
